// === Linked Editing ===
=== /incomplete.tsx ===
function Test() {
    return <[|/*0*/div|]>
        <
        <div {...{}}>
        </[|/*0*/div|]>
    </div>
}

=== 0 ===
{
  "ranges": [
    {
      "start": {
        "line": 1,
        "character": 12
      },
      "end": {
        "line": 1,
        "character": 15
      }
    },
    {
      "start": {
        "line": 4,
        "character": 10
      },
      "end": {
        "line": 4,
        "character": 13
      }
    }
  ],
  "wordPattern": "[a-zA-Z0-9:\\-\\._$]*"
}


// === Linked Editing ===
=== /incompleteMismatched.tsx ===
function Test() {
    return <[|/*1*/div|]>
        <T
        <div {...{}}>
        </[|/*1*/div|]>
    </div>
}

=== 1 ===
{
  "ranges": [
    {
      "start": {
        "line": 1,
        "character": 12
      },
      "end": {
        "line": 1,
        "character": 15
      }
    },
    {
      "start": {
        "line": 4,
        "character": 10
      },
      "end": {
        "line": 4,
        "character": 13
      }
    }
  ],
  "wordPattern": "[a-zA-Z0-9:\\-\\._$]*"
}


// === Linked Editing ===
=== /incompleteMismatched2.tsx ===
function Test() {
    return <[|/*2*/div|]>
        <T
        <div {...{}}>
        T</[|/*2*/div|]>
    </div>
}

=== 2 ===
{
  "ranges": [
    {
      "start": {
        "line": 1,
        "character": 12
      },
      "end": {
        "line": 1,
        "character": 15
      }
    },
    {
      "start": {
        "line": 4,
        "character": 11
      },
      "end": {
        "line": 4,
        "character": 14
      }
    }
  ],
  "wordPattern": "[a-zA-Z0-9:\\-\\._$]*"
}


// === Linked Editing ===
=== /incompleteMismatched3.tsx ===
function Test() {
    return <[|/*3*/div|]>
        <div {...{}}>
        </[|/*3*/div|]>
        <T
    </div>
}

=== 3 ===
{
  "ranges": [
    {
      "start": {
        "line": 1,
        "character": 12
      },
      "end": {
        "line": 1,
        "character": 15
      }
    },
    {
      "start": {
        "line": 3,
        "character": 10
      },
      "end": {
        "line": 3,
        "character": 13
      }
    }
  ],
  "wordPattern": "[a-zA-Z0-9:\\-\\._$]*"
}


// === Linked Editing ===
=== /mismatched.tsx ===
function Test() {
    return <[|/*4*/div|]>
        <T>
        <div {...{}}>
        </[|/*4*/div|]>
    </div>
}

=== 4 ===
{
  "ranges": [
    {
      "start": {
        "line": 1,
        "character": 12
      },
      "end": {
        "line": 1,
        "character": 15
      }
    },
    {
      "start": {
        "line": 4,
        "character": 10
      },
      "end": {
        "line": 4,
        "character": 13
      }
    }
  ],
  "wordPattern": "[a-zA-Z0-9:\\-\\._$]*"
}


// === Linked Editing ===
=== /matched.tsx ===
function Test() {
    return <[|/*5*/div|]>

        <div {...{}}>
        </[|/*5*/div|]>
    </div>
}

=== 5 ===
{
  "ranges": [
    {
      "start": {
        "line": 1,
        "character": 12
      },
      "end": {
        "line": 1,
        "character": 15
      }
    },
    {
      "start": {
        "line": 4,
        "character": 10
      },
      "end": {
        "line": 4,
        "character": 13
      }
    }
  ],
  "wordPattern": "[a-zA-Z0-9:\\-\\._$]*"
}
